# Calibration Protocol

## Baseline Drift

Record torsion-arm motion for at least:
- 10 minutes unpowered
- 10 minutes after stabilization

## Static Response Validation

Verify torsional sensitivity using:
- small electrostatic perturbations
- controlled mechanical impulse
- repeatable displacement checks

## Laser Calibration

Measure:
- wall displacement
- angular conversion factor
- drift rate
- environmental sensitivity
